prose: Water frontier-orbital analysis computed via DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input `.xyz` file (3 atoms: O, H, H), single-point (not re-optimized). SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans orbital gap): **8.9406687 eV**. HOMO energy: −8.6037 eV; LUMO energy: +0.3370 eV. Total electronic energy: −2080.6615 eV. Koopmans-based descriptors also available (vertical ionization potential, electron affinity, electronegativity, hardness, electrophilicity index). No convergence issues or warnings. Integrity check: trustworthy=true.
